name: Hackathon Setup Guide
description: This guide provides a step-by-step process for setting up Featherless.ai, an AI inference platform, including signing up for a premium account, obtaining an API key, and choosing a model.
context: unlimited access to open-source AI models
displayed_info: This guide provides a step-by-step process for setting up Featherless.ai, an AI inference platform, including signing up for a premium account, obtaining an API key, and choosing a model. Featherless.ai is a serverless AI platform that offers unlimited access to open-source AI models but has concurrency limits.

flashcards.a: Featherless.ai is a serverless AI platform.
Unlimited access to open-source AI models.

flashcards.q: What is required to use Featherless.ai?
flashcards.a: A premium account and an API key.
